arts.ttl: Liverpool Premier League title favourites: Pep Guardiola, Manchester City knocked out of race, Arsenal, Mikel Arteta hanging on
arts.sum: Liverpool have eliminated Manchester City from the title race and are so far ahead of Arsenal that only an injury crisis could prevent the Reds from winning the league.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag signing is 'the future of Man Utd' says Amorim
arts.sum: During his post-match press conference ahead of Man Utd’s trip to Arsenal, Amorim insisted: “It's important to be brave. Mazraoui won Man Utd’s November Player of the Month award following a string of impressive performances in a new centre-back role and Amorim has consistently heaped praise on the 27-year-old over the past few weeks.

arts.sum: Former Man United captain Harry Maguire is hopeful of extending his contract at Old Trafford as the centre-back is keen to be part of the Ruben Amorim era at the Premier League giants. arts.ttl: Arsenal receive fresh Nico Williams transfer boost as huge January decision made
arts.sum: The Gunners were one of many top clubs in Europe interested in signing the Athletic Bilbao star following his excellent performances with Spain at Euro 2024, but he opted to stay in the Basque Country. According to the Athletic, Williams is now more open to a Premier League move than previously, but would prefer to not move in the January trading period.

arts.ttl: Football chiefs to introduce new 'Mikel Arteta law' after Arsenal boss' touchline antics
arts.sum: The International Football Association Board (IFAB) are set to change their laws for coaches mistakenly interfering with play after Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta handled the ball before it crossed the touchline last month

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'targeting suprise move' for Serie A goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly considering a surprise move to sign Napoli goalkeeper Alex Meret, who is out of contract at the end of the season.
